issues.description: First action rests Self (this Character), but card text says 'You may rest this Character' as a cost/option, not a mandatory effect. The primary action is resting opponent's Character. Structure should reflect optional self-rest as condition, not as separate action.

Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is correct, but 'maxCost' parameter may not be standard. Should use 'maxCost' or 'costLimit' depending on DSL schema. Verify parameter name matches official spec.
Missing 'condition' field to express 'may' (optional activation). The effect should include a condition or optional flag to represent that the activation is not mandatory.
